page.primary_keyword: Marbella New Year's Eve yacht fireworks
page.title: Marbella NYE Yacht Charter: Best Spots for Fireworks Views

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella New Year's Eve yacht charter for prime fireworks views. From €749/2h in Puerto Banús. Reserve your spot now for 2025.
data.summary: Discover the best spots for fireworks views on a Marbella New Year's Eve yacht charter. Our guide covers prime anchorages, boat options from €749, and insider tips for an unforgettable NYE on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h or €2,299/8h.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) from €4,719/4h, include free jet ski.
Fireworks displays at Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina, and Estepona.
Best anchorages: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and off the Golden Mile.
Book early—NYE charters sell out by mid-December.
All boats depart from Puerto Banús; 12+ pax capacity available.

faq.q: What is the best spot to watch fireworks from a yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: For Puerto Banús fireworks, anchor near the Banús harbour mouth (36.487°N, -4.962°W) or off the Golden Mile. For Marbella Marina displays, Cala del Faro offers a clear view. Estepona fireworks are best seen from Cala Cortés. All spots are within 15 minutes' cruise from our base.

faq.q: How much does a New Year's Eve yacht charter cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats like the Mangusta 80 cost €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and include a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. You just bring your group and a party spirit.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and decorations on board?
faq.a: Yes, you're welcome to bring your own food, decorations, and party supplies. Many guests bring a NYE picnic or order catering from local Marbella restaurants. Just avoid glassware on some boats. Let us know in advance for any special arrangements.

faq.q: How many people can fit on a yacht for NYE?
faq.a: Capacity ranges from 5 guests on the Dubhe or Mariah SX21 up to 12 guests on our larger boats like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, or Ferretti 94. For groups over 12, consider booking multiple yachts—we can coordinate a flotilla.

faq.q: What time should I book my charter for fireworks?
faq.a: For midnight fireworks, book a 4-hour charter starting at 9:30 PM or an 8-hour charter from 6 PM. This gives you time to cruise to the best anchor spot, enjoy sunset drinks, and be in position for the countdown. For earlier displays, a 2-hour charter works.

faq.q: Are there any special NYE packages or extras available?
faq.a: We don't offer fixed packages, but you can add extras like a private chef, champagne upgrades, or a DJ setup on select boats. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom requests. The Mangusta 80 charters include a free jet ski, perfect for a pre-fireworks thrill.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on NYE?
faq.a: Marbella's winter weather is generally mild (12-18°C), but if strong winds or storms are forecast, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule to January 1st or 2nd. Safety is paramount—our skippers make the final call. We advise booking a flexible date.

data.body_html:
Ring in the new year on the Mediterranean with a Marbella New Year's Eve yacht fireworks charter. With prime anchorages just minutes from Puerto Banús, you'll watch the sky ignite over Marbella's coastline while sipping cava on deck. Our fleet of 18 boats—from intimate speedboats to 29-metre superyachts—offers options for every group, all with licensed skippers, drinks, and snacks included. Here's where to anchor, what to book, and how to make NYE 2025 unforgettable.

Best Fireworks Viewing Spots from a Yacht

Marbella's fireworks displays are launched from three main locations. For Puerto Banús, anchor just outside the harbour mouth (36.487°N, -4.962°W) for a front-row seat to the 10-minute show at midnight. The Golden Mile stretch between Banús and Marbella Marina offers a panoramic view of both displays. For Marbella Marina fireworks, head to Cala del Faro—a natural cove 1.5 NM east of the marina. Estepona's display, 12 NM west, is best viewed from Cala Cortés. All spots are within a 15-minute cruise from our Puerto Banús base.

Yacht Options for Your NYE Celebration

Our boat rental Marbella fleet includes boats for every group size and budget. For couples or small groups (up to 5), the Dubhe (8m) or Mariah SX21 (6.4m) offer cosy sunset cruises. For larger parties (8-11 guests), the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, €749/2h) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, same price) are the most popular NYE choices. For a luxury experience with 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (24m, €4,719/4h) includes a free jet ski for pre-fireworks fun. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.

What's Included in Every Charter

No hidden costs. Every booking includes: a licensed English-speaking skipper, fuel for the full duration, unlimited water and soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks (crisps, olives, nuts), full insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You only need to bring your group and any extra food or decorations. For larger boats, we can arrange catering from local Marbella restaurants—just ask via WhatsApp when booking.

Sample NYE Itinerary: 6 PM to Midnight

An 8-hour charter (€2,299 on Tier A boats) gives you the full experience. Depart Puerto Banús at 6 PM, cruise west along the Golden Mile as the sun sets over La Concha. Anchor at Cala del Faro for a pre-dinner swim (water temp ~16°C) or hot tub on board. At 9 PM, move to the Banús anchorage. Enjoy cava and canapés as the harbour lights up. At midnight, watch the fireworks from your deck. After the show, cruise back to port—the skipper handles everything.

Why Book Early for NYE

New Year's Eve is the busiest night of the year for Marbella charters. Our Tier A boats typically sell out by mid-December. The Mangusta 80s (white and grey variants) are often booked weeks in advance. To secure your preferred boat and time slot, reserve with a 50% deposit. We accept bank transfer or card. Full payment is due 7 days before departure. Cancellations up to 14 days before NYE receive a full refund (minus €50 admin fee).

What to Wear and Bring

December evenings in Marbella average 12-16°C. Bring a warm jacket, scarf, and flat shoes for deck movement. The boat provides blankets, but extra layers are smart. For decorations, battery-operated fairy lights and non-glass tableware are ideal. Many guests bring a NYE hat and party poppers. If you're on a Mangusta 80, the jet ski is available—bring a wetsuit if you plan to ride before dark.

Getting to Puerto Banús

Our base is at Puerto Banús, Marbella, 10 minutes from the A-7 motorway. Free parking is available in the public car park (€10 for 24h). Málaga Airport is 55 km away (40 minutes by taxi, ~€60). For groups, we can arrange a private transfer. If you're staying on the Golden Mile or in Marbella town, a taxi from Marbella centre costs about €15. Arrive 20 minutes before your departure time for boarding.

Other Boats for NYE

Beyond the Tier A and Tier B options, our fleet includes the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax), Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax), Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax), and Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax). These are priced on request via WhatsApp—ideal for corporate events or a luxury group celebration. All depart from Puerto Banús and include the same full-service package.

Frequently asked questions

What is the best spot to watch fireworks from a yacht in Marbella?

For Puerto Banús fireworks, anchor near the Banús harbour mouth (36.487°N, -4.962°W) or off the Golden Mile. For Marbella Marina displays, Cala del Faro offers a clear view. Estepona fireworks are best seen from Cala Cortés. All spots are within 15 minutes' cruise from our base.

How much does a New Year's Eve yacht charter cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats like the Mangusta 80 cost €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and include a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. You just bring your group and a party spirit.

Can I bring my own food and decorations on board?

Yes, you're welcome to bring your own food, decorations, and party supplies. Many guests bring a NYE picnic or order catering from local Marbella restaurants. Just avoid glassware on some boats. Let us know in advance for any special arrangements.

How many people can fit on a yacht for NYE?

Capacity ranges from 5 guests on the Dubhe or Mariah SX21 up to 12 guests on our larger boats like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, or Ferretti 94. For groups over 12, consider booking multiple yachts—we can coordinate a flotilla.

What time should I book my charter for fireworks?

For midnight fireworks, book a 4-hour charter starting at 9:30 PM or an 8-hour charter from 6 PM. This gives you time to cruise to the best anchor spot, enjoy sunset drinks, and be in position for the countdown. For earlier displays, a 2-hour charter works.

Are there any special NYE packages or extras available?

We don't offer fixed packages, but you can add extras like a private chef, champagne upgrades, or a DJ setup on select boats. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom requests. The Mangusta 80 charters include a free jet ski, perfect for a pre-fireworks thrill.

What happens if the weather is bad on NYE?

Marbella's winter weather is generally mild (12-18°C), but if strong winds or storms are forecast, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule to January 1st or 2nd. Safety is paramount—our skippers make the final call. We advise booking a flexible date.
